description: As a remote sensing scientist, combine the Sentinel-2 spectral band files sentinel2_B04_red.tif and sentinel2_B08_nir.tif from /home/ga/snap_data/ into a single multi-spectral product. Derive a vegetation characterization index from the combined data. Save the integrated product in BEAM-DIMAP format and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/.
